13933:
My eyes fixed on the prize
I pick up the pace, racing even further
21083:
Never looking back
Instead I make this oath
24750:
To carry on
To the future!
44700:
Though the downpour continues on
Attempting to drown me out
51667:
The voice inside my heart
Continues to shout
57933:
Even with the fog up ahead
And the track a muddy mess to tread
64267:
I race on, my spirit still ablaze
No obstacle is getting in my way!
72667:
Some things don't go as planned
But even on days filled with tearful cries
78800: I don't give it up! Gotta believe in me!
82050: And the flame blazing deep in my heart!
85117:
Today we make an oath
To brave the trials in our future path
91500:
Never looking back
I'll stand by my oath
94683:
To carry on
and believe in myself!
